title: The Provisional collection of Taxes Act,2023
full_text: The Provisional collection of Taxes Act,2023 अनंतिम कर संग्रहण अधिनियम, 2023 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 202350 Act Number: 50 Enactment Date: 2023-12-28 Act Year: 2023 Short Title: The Provisional collection of Taxes Act,2023 Hindi Title: अनंतिम कर संग्रहण अधिनियम, 2023 Long Title: An Act to provide for the immediate effect for a limited period of provisions in Bills relating to the imposition or increase of duties of customs or excise.
